commitResults.messageTitle: Fix watchlist buy / add to refresh holding last price on additional purchase
commitResults.messageBody:
Update Portfolio.addHolding(...) so existing holdings receive lastPrice = purchasePrice when quantity is added
Add regression test in PortfolioTest to verify last price updates after buying more into an existing holding
Ensures /watch buy valuations and unrealized P&L use the most recent transaction price instead of stale price
Fix watchlist buy / add to refresh holding last price on additional p…

commitResults.messageTitle: Reject portfolio names containing storage delimiter |
commitResults.messageBody:
Add validation in PortfolioBook#createPortfolio(...) to reject portfolio names containing |
Prevent storage corruption from names like my|portfolio that would break the PORTFOLIO|... line format
Add regression test in PortfolioBookTest for the new validation message
Reject portfolio names containing storage delimiter |

Update Ui.showInsightsTable(...) so - Top detractor: none is shown when the worst priced holding has zero or positive unrealized P&L
Prevent the command from incorrectly labeling the lowest positive contributor as a detractor
Add regression coverage in UiTest for all-positive holdings in /insights
Fix /insights incorrectly labels "Top detractor"

Add logging and refactor UI/storage helper code

Introduce Logger usage in CG2StocksTracker and Storage
Replace repeated IllegalArgumentException-to-AppException conversion with helper
Centralize corrupted storage parsing handling in Storage
Extract reusable printFormatted/printDivider helpers in Ui
Improve SLAP and reduce output formatting duplication
Added Logging to storage

commitResults.messageTitle: Updated DG and minor code edits
commitResults.messageBody: Edited DG to reduce repetition. Also added tests and reduced reused code in Parser
Updated DG and minor code edits

Fix blank portfolio name validation and add state invariant assertions
- Reject portfolio names that are blank after trimming in Parser
  - validatePortfolioName() centralizes checks for blank/null/slash-prefixed names
  - Applies .strip() to remove leading/trailing whitespace before validation
  - Covers /create and /use commands
- Add regression tests for blank quoted portfolio names
  -parseCreate_withBlankQuotedName_throws()
  - parseUse_withBlankQuotedName_throws()

- Add defensive assertions for method contracts
  - Portfolio: precondition/postcondition checks in addHolding(), null-entry checks in getHoldings()
  - PortfolioBook: state transition verification in createPortfolio() and usePortfolio(), collection integrity in getPortfolios()
  - Storage: file existence and data integrity checks in load() and save()
  - Parser: input validation and output postcondition checks in parseCreate(), parseUse(), tokenise()
Added Assertions
Removed duplicate and git branching code to pass CL
Edited the UI spelling error causing failure
Cleared unwanted git branching code

commitResults.messageTitle: Suppress Logging Output for Users and update runtest with insights command
commitResults.messageBody:
Suppress console log output and add /insights to text-UI test

- Add LogManager.getLogManager().reset() in main() to prevent
  java.util.logging WARNING messages from printing to stderr
- Add /insights, /insights --type stock, /insights --top 2, and
  /insights --chart to text-ui-test/input.txt
- Regenerate EXPECTED.TXT to include insights command output
Suppress Logging Output for Users and update runtest with insights
